ValidationRule.description: All Data ready for Flag AbacusSupplierr=True
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, AbacusSupplier__c = True,
OR( ISBLANK (BillingZip__c), ISBLANK (BillingCity__c), ISBLANK (TEXT (CurrencyIsoCode)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Account Supplier not complete. Please adjust and then save again. (ACM009)
